rag_rules: Fix unresolved references by ensuring all identifiers are valid AADL features or declared helpers in the same annex scope.
Use only visible AADL features or declared equation helpers in AGREE contracts; avoid referencing undefined symbols.
Validate that all AGREE type declarations (const, eq) use valid scalar types: int, real, bool.
generic_rules: When generating AGREE contracts, ensure all referenced identifiers are declared or exist in the current AADL scope.
AGREE expressions must have consistent types; resolve type mismatches by aligning helper declarations with their usage.
Avoid introducing package-qualified identifiers in AGREE annexes unless explicitly required and available in the model.
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: AGREE contracts must be enclosed in `annex agree {** ... **};` blocks.
Assignments in implementation scopes must reference existing output features or declared auxiliary variables.
Equation declarations in AGREE should use valid scalar types: int, real, bool.
anti_patterns: Do not reference undefined identifiers or features in AGREE contracts without prior declaration.
Do not mix invalid or mismatched types in AGREE expressions; ensure type consistency in helpers and guarantees.
Do not introduce package-qualified names in AGREE annexes unless they are present in the model's configured dependencies.
